message:
perf(server): Pre-sort resource template keys by specificity

Move template sorting from resolve_resource() to registration time.
Instead of sorting on every resource lookup, maintain a pre-sorted
Vec of template keys that's rebuilt when templates are added.

Benefits:
- resolve_resource() is now O(n) instead of O(n log n)
- Eliminates repeated sorting for high-throughput servers
- Sort cost amortized over template registrations

Isomorphism: Matching order identical - same resources matched for same URIs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
